Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** *Fixing notation, terminology and basic lemmas *)

(** By Alvaro Pelayo, Vladimir Voevodsky and Michael A. Warren *)

(** made compatible with the current UniMath library again by Benedikt Ahrens in 2014
    and by Ralph Matthes in 2017 *)

(** Imports *)

Require Export UniMath.Tactics.EnsureStructuredProofs.

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.RigsAndRings.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Domains_and_Fields.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.

Unset Kernel Term Sharing. (** for quicker proof-checking, approx. by factor 25 *)

(** Fixing some notation *)

(** * Notation, terminology  *)

Arguments tpair [ T P ].

Definition neq ( X : UU ) : hrel X :=
  fun x y : X => make_hProp (neg (x = y)) (isapropneg (x = y)).

(** * I. Lemmas on natural numbers *)


n: nat
n - 0 = n


n: nat
n - 0 = n

  destruct n; apply idpath.
Defined.

S n - S n = 0

 apply idpath.

Defined.

n, m: nat
p: 0 < S n
q: 0 < S m
r: S n ≤ S m
a: n ≤ m
a0: n - 0 ≤ m
S n - 1 ≤ S m - 1

      exact ( transportf ( fun x : nat => natleh ( sub n 0 ) x ) (pathsinv0 ( minus0r m ) ) a0 ).
Defined.

IHb: ∏ a : nat, (∃ c : nat, a + c = b) → a ≤ b

p: ∃ c : nat, S a + c = S b
c: nat

b: nat

S (a + c) = S b

        assumption. 
b: nat
IHb: ∏ a : nat, (∃ c : nat, a + c = b) → a ≤ b
a: nat
p: ∃ c : nat, S a + c = S b
c: nat
f: S a + c = S b
q: a ≤ b
S a ≤ S b

      apply q.
Defined.

f: a * k = b
(a ≤ b) ⨿ (b = 0)

(a ≤ b) ⨿ (b = 0)

b = 0

0 = b

a ≤ b

((∑ c : nat, a + c = b) → P) → P

P

g: (∑ c : nat, a + c = b) → P

f: k * a + a = b

g: (∑ c : nat, a + c = b) → P
a + k * a = b

f: k * a + a = b
P: hProp
g: (∑ c : nat, a + c = b) → P
k * a + a = b

    assumption.
Defined.

(** * II. Lemmas on rings *)

Local Open Scope ring_scope.


X: commring
a, b, c: X
a * (b - c) = a * b - a * c


X: commring
a, b, c: X
a * (b - c) = a * b - a * c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
a * (b - c) = a * b - a * c
 
X: commring
a, b, c: X
a * b + a * - c = a * b - a * c
 
X: commring
a, b, c: X
a * b - a * c = a * b - a * c
 apply idpath.
Defined.


X: commring
a, b, c: X
(b - c) * a = b * a - c * a


X: commring
a, b, c: X
(b - c) * a = b * a - c * a

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
(b - c) * a = b * a - c * a
 
X: commring
a, b, c: X
b * a + - c * a = b * a - c * a
 
X: commring
a, b, c: X
b * a - c * a = b * a - c * a
 apply idpath.
Defined.


A: commring
a, b: A
p: multinvpair A a
q: multinvpair A b
multinvpair A (a * b)


A: commring
a, b: A
p: multinvpair A a
q: multinvpair A b
multinvpair A (a * b)

  
A: commring
a, b: A
p: multinvpair A a
q: multinvpair A b
multinvpair A (a * b)
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
q: multinvpair A b
multinvpair A (a * b)
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
multinvpair A (a * b)

  
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(b' * a' + a * b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a * b + b' * a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(b' * a' + a * b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(a * b + b' * a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid

  
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(b' * a' + a * b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b' * a' * (a * b) = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b' * (a' * (a * b)) = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b' * (a' * a * b) = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b' * (a' * a * b) = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
b' * (a' * a * b) = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
b' * (a' * a * b) = b' * b
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
a' * a * b = b

a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
f: a' * a * b = 1 * b
a' * a * b = b

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
f: a' * a * b = b
a' * a * b = b
 assumption.
  
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(a * b + b' * a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid

a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
a * b * (b' * a') = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
a * (b * (b' * a')) = 1
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: (a' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + a')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
a * (b * b' * a') = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: (b' + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (b + b')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
a * (b * b' * a') = 1

a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
a * (b * b' * a') = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
a * (b * b' * a') = b * b'
 
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
a * (1 * a') = 1

    
A: commring
a, b: A
a': rigmultmonoid A
p: a' * a = 1 × a * a' = 1
b': rigmultmonoid A
q: b' * b = 1 × b * b' = 1
a * a' = 1
 apply (pr2 p).
Defined.


X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
b = c


X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
b = c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
b = c
 
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
b + 0 = c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
b + (a + c) = c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
b + a + c = c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
a + b + c = c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
0 + c = c

  
X: commring
a, b, c: X
p: a + b = 0
q: a + c = 0
c = c

  apply idpath.
Defined.


X: commring
a: X
isaprop (multinvpair X a)


X: commring
a: X
isaprop (multinvpair X a)

a: X
isaprop (multinvpair X a)
 
X: commring
a: X
isofhlevel 1 (multinvpair X a)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
isofhlevel 0 (b = c)

  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
b = c
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f: b = c
isofhlevel 0 (b = c)

  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
b = c
 
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: multinvpair X a
b,, b' = c

    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b,, b' = c,, c'

    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b = c
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
b,, b' = c,, c'

    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b = c
 
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b * 1 = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(b + 0)%addmonoid = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(b + (a + c))%addmonoid = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b * (a * c) = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
b * a * c = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
(b + a)%addmonoid * c = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
0%addmonoid * c = c

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
1 * c = c

      apply ringlunax2.
    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
b,, b' = c,, c'

    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
transportf
  (λ x' : rigmultmonoid X,
   (x' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid) f0 b' = c'

    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
isaprop (c * a = 1 × a * c = 1)
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
is: isaprop (c * a = 1 × a * c = 1)
transportf
  (λ x' : rigmultmonoid X,
   (x' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid) f0 b' = c'

    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
isaprop (c * a = 1 × a * c = 1)
 
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
isofhlevel 1 (c * a = 1)
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
isofhlevel 1 (a * c = 1)

      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
isofhlevel 1 (c * a = 1)
 apply ( setproperty X ).
      
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
isofhlevel 1 (a * c = 1)
 apply ( setproperty X ).
    
X: commring
a: X
b: rigmultmonoid X
b': (b + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + b)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
c: rigmultmonoid X
c': (c + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
× (a + c)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
f0: b = c
is: isaprop (c * a = 1 × a * c = 1)
transportf
  (λ x' : rigmultmonoid X,
   (x' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid) f0 b' = c'

    apply is.
  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f: b = c
isofhlevel 0 (b = c)

  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f: b = c
∏ t : b = c, t = f
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
g = f

  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isaset (multinvpair X a)
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
is: isaset (multinvpair X a)
g = f

  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isaset (multinvpair X a)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isaset (invpair (rigmultmonoid X) a)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isaset
  (∑ x' : rigmultmonoid X,
   (x' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)

    
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isofhlevel 2
  (∑ x' : rigmultmonoid X,
   (x' + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x')%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)

    
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isofhlevel 2 (rigmultmonoid X)
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
∏ x : rigmultmonoid X,
isofhlevel 2
  ((x + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)

    
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
isofhlevel 2 (rigmultmonoid X)
 apply ( pr2 ( pr1 ( pr1 ( rigmultmonoid X ) ) ) ).
    
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
∏ x : rigmultmonoid X,
isofhlevel 2
  ((x + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 2
  ((x + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
   × (a + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 2 ((x + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 2 ((a + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)

      
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 2 ((x + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 1 ((x + a)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)

        apply ( setproperty X ).
      
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 2 ((a + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)
 
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
x: rigmultmonoid X
isofhlevel 1 ((a + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid)
 apply (setproperty X ).
  
X: commring
a: X
b, c: multinvpair X a
f, g: b = c
is: isaset (multinvpair X a)
g = f

  apply is.
Defined.

Close Scope ring_scope.

(** * III. Lemmas on hz *)

Local Open Scope hz_scope.


n, m: hz
- (n + m) = - n + - m


n, m: hz
- (n + m) = - n + - m

  
n, m: hz
- (n + m) = - n + - m

  
n, m: hz
((n + m)%hz + (- (n + m))%hz)%ring = 0%ring
n, m: hz
((n + m)%hz + (- n + - m)%hz)%ring = 0%ring

  
n, m: hz
((n + m)%hz + (- (n + m))%hz)%ring = 0%ring
 apply ringrinvax1.
  
n, m: hz
((n + m)%hz + (- n + - m)%hz)%ring = 0%ring
 
n, m: hz
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
((n + m)%hz + (- n + - m)%hz)%ring = 0%ring

    
n, m: hz
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
m + (- n + - m) = m + - n + - m
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
m + - n + - m = m + (- n + - m)
 apply ringassoc1. 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
m + - n + - m = - n + m + - m
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
m + - n = - n + m

        apply ringcomm1. 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
n + (- n + m) + - m = n + (- n + m + - m)
 apply ringassoc1. 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n + (- n + m) + - m = n + - n + m + - m
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
i4: n + (- n + m) + - m = n + - n + m + - m
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n + (- n + m) + - m = n + - n + m + - m
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n + - n + m + - m = n + (- n + m) + - m
 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
n + - n + m = n + (- n + m)

        apply ringassoc1. 
n, m: hz
i0: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + (m + (- n + - m))
i1: n + (m + (- n + - m)) = n + (m + - n + - m)
i2: n + (m + - n + - m) = n + (- n + m + - m)
i3: n + (- n + m + - m) = n + (- n + m) + - m
i4: n + (- n + m) + - m = n + - n + m + - m
n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m

      exact ( pathscomp0 i0 ( pathscomp0 i1 ( pathscomp0 i2 ( pathscomp0 i3 i4 ) ) ) ).    
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
((n + m)%hz + (- n + - m)%hz)%ring = 0%ring

    
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j: n + - n + m + - m = 0
((n + m)%hz + (- n + - m)%hz)%ring = 0%ring

    
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0
 
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0

      
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
 
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
n + - n = 0

        apply ringrinvax1. 
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0

      
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
0 + m + - m = m + - m
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
j1: 0 + m + - m = m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0

      
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
0 + m + - m = m + - m
 
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
0 + m = m

        apply ringlunax1. 
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
j1: 0 + m + - m = m + - m
n + - n + m + - m = 0

      
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j0: n + - n + m + - m = 0 + m + - m
j1: 0 + m + - m = m + - m
j2: m + - m = 0
n + - n + m + - m = 0

      exact ( pathscomp0 j0 ( pathscomp0 j1 j2 ) ).
    
n, m: hz
i: n + m + (- n + - m) = n + - n + m + - m
j: n + - n + m + - m = 0
((n + m)%hz + (- n + - m)%hz)%ring = 0%ring

    exact ( pathscomp0 i j ).
Defined.


n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgeh n m


n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgeh n m

  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgeh n m

  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
c:= hzgthchoice2 (n + 1) m: hzgth (n + 1) m
→ hzgth (n + 1) (m + 1) ⨿ (n + 1 = m + 1)
hzgeh n m

  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgth (n + 1) m
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
h: hzgth (n + 1) (m + 1)
hzgeh n m
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
k: n + 1 = m + 1
hzgeh n m

  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgth (n + 1) m
 exact p.
  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
h: hzgth (n + 1) (m + 1)
hzgeh n m
 
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
h: hzgth (n + 1) (m + 1)
a: hzgth n m
hzgeh n m

    
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
h: hzgth (n + 1) (m + 1)
a: hzgth n m
hzgth n m
 exact a.
  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
k: n + 1 = m + 1
hzgeh n m
 
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
k: n + 1 = m + 1
hzgeh m m
 apply isreflhzgeh.
Defined.


n, m: hz
p: hzlth m (n + 1)
hzleh m n


n, m: hz
p: hzlth m (n + 1)
hzleh m n

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth m (n + 1)
hzleh m n
 
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzleh m n

  
n, m: hz
p: hzgth (n + 1) m
a: hzgeh n m
hzleh m n

  exact a.
Defined.


n: hz
(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)


n: hz
(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)

(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)

  
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)

r: 0%nat = hzabsval n
(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)

l: 0 < hzabsval n
(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)
 
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n
 
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
S (hzabsval n - 1) = hzabsval n

l: 0 < hzabsval n
(S (hzabsval n) - 1)%nat = hzabsval n
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
1 < S (hzabsval n)

    
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
(S (hzabsval n) - 1)%nat = hzabsval n
 
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
(hzabsval n - 0)%nat = hzabsval n

      
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
hzabsval n = hzabsval n
 apply idpath.
    
n: hz
l: 0 < hzabsval n
1 < S (hzabsval n)
 assumption.
  
n: hz
r: 0%nat = hzabsval n
(0%nat = hzabsval n) ⨿ (∑ x : nat, S x = hzabsval n)
 
n: hz
r: 0%nat = hzabsval n
0%nat = hzabsval n
 assumption.
Defined.


n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
hzlth (- m) (- n)


n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
hzlth (- m) (- n)

p: hzlth n m
hzlth (- m) (- n)

p: hzlth n m
hzlth (0 + - m) (- n)

p: hzlth n m
hzlth (n - n + - m) (- n)

p: hzlth n m
hzlth (n + - n + - m) (- n)

p: hzlth n m
hzlth (n + (- n + - m)) (- n)
 
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
hzlth (n + (- m + - n)) (- n)

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
- n = 0 + - n
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
- n = 0 + - n
 
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
0 + - n = - n
 apply hzplusl0. 
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (0 + - n)
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
q: hzlth (n + - m + - n) (0 + - n)
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (0 + - n)
 
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m) 0
  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m) (m - m)

    
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth (n + - m) (m + - m)

    
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
hzlth n m

    assumption. 
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
q: hzlth (n + - m + - n) (0 + - n)
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)

  
n, m: hz
p: hzlth n m
f: - n = 0 + - n
q: hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)
hzlth (n + - m + - n) (- n)

  assumption.
Defined.


n, m: hz
(hzlth n m → hzlth 0 (m - n))
× (hzlth 0 (m - n) → hzlth n m)


n, m: hz
(hzlth n m → hzlth 0 (m - n))
× (hzlth 0 (m - n) → hzlth n m)

  
n, m: hz
(hzlth n m → hzlth 0 (m - n))
× (hzlth 0 (m - n) → hzlth n m)
 
n, m: hz
(hzlth n m → hzlth (n - n) (m - n))
× (hzlth (n - n) (m - n) → hzlth n m)

  
n, m: hz
(hzlth n m → hzlth (n + - n) (m - n))
× (hzlth (n + - n) (m - n) → hzlth n m)

 apply right.
Defined.

Definition hzrdistr ( a b c : hz ) : ( a + b ) * c = ( a * c ) + ( b * c ) :=
  ringrdistr hz a b c.

Definition hzldistr ( a b c : hz ) : c * ( a + b ) = ( c * a ) + ( c * b ) :=
  ringldistr hz a b c.



hzabsval 1 = 1%nat


hzabsval 1 = 1%nat

Close Scope hz_scope.

(** * IV. Generalities on apartness relations *)

Definition iscomparel { X : UU } ( R : hrel X ) :=
  forall x y z : X, R x y -> R x z ⨿ R z y.

Definition isapart { X : UU } ( R : hrel X ) :=
  isirrefl R × ( issymm R × iscotrans R ).

Definition istightapart { X : UU } ( R : hrel X ) :=
  isapart R × forall x y : X, neg ( R x y ) -> x = y.

Definition apart ( X : hSet ) := ∑ R : hrel X, isapart R.

Definition isbinopapartl { X : hSet } ( R : apart X ) ( opp : binop X ) :=
  forall a b c : X, ( pr1 R ( opp a b ) ( opp a c ) ) -> pr1 R b c.

Definition isbinopapartr { X : hSet } ( R : apart X ) ( opp : binop X ) :=
  forall a b c : X, pr1 R ( opp b a ) ( opp c a ) -> pr1 R b c.

Definition isbinopapart { X : hSet } ( R : apart X ) ( opp : binop X ) :=
  isbinopapartl R opp × isbinopapartr R opp.


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
isapart (neq X)

is: isdeceq X

p: neq X a b

r: a != c
neq X a c
 assumption.
Defined.

Definition isapartdec { X : hSet } ( R : apart X ) :=
  forall a b : X, pr1 R a b  ⨿ ( a = b ).


X: hSet
R: apart X
is: isapartdec R
isdeceq X

is: isapartdec R
isdeceq X

y, z: X

a, b: X
l: a = b
pr1 (neq X,, deceqtoneqapart is) a b ⨿ (a = b)
 
X: hSet
is: isdeceq X
a, b: X
l: a = b
a = b
 assumption.
  
X: hSet
is: isdeceq X
a, b: X
r: a != b
pr1 (neq X,, deceqtoneqapart is) a b ⨿ (a = b)
 
X: hSet
is: isdeceq X
a, b: X
r: a != b
pr1 (neq X,, deceqtoneqapart is) a b
 
X: hSet
is: isdeceq X
a, b: X
r: a != b
f: a = b
∅
 
X: hSet
is: isdeceq X
a, b: X
r: a != b
f: a = b
a = b
 assumption.
Defined.

(** * V. Apartness relations on rings *)

Local Open Scope ring_scope.

Definition acommring := ∑ (X : commring) (R : apart X),
  isbinopapart R ( @op1 X ) × isbinopapart R ( @op2 X ).

Definition make_acommring := tpair ( P := fun X : commring =>
  ∑ R : apart X, isbinopapart R ( @op1 X ) × isbinopapart R ( @op2 X ) ).
Definition acommringconstr := make_acommring.

Definition acommringtocommring : acommring -> commring := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion acommringtocommring : acommring >-> commring.

Definition acommringapartrel ( X : acommring ) : hrel (pr1 X) :=
  pr1 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ).

Notation " a # b " := ( acommringapartrel _ a b )  (* ( at level 50 ) *) :
ring_scope.

Definition acommring_aadd ( X : acommring ) : isbinopapart ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) op1 :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( pr2 X ) ).

Definition acommring_amult ( X : acommring ) : isbinopapart ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) op2 :=
  pr2 ( pr2 ( pr2 X ) ).

Definition acommring_airrefl ( X : acommring ) : isirrefl ( pr1 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) ) :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) ).

Definition acommring_asymm ( X : acommring ) : issymm ( pr1 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) ) :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( pr2 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) ) ).

Definition acommring_acotrans ( X : acommring ) : iscotrans ( pr1 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) ) :=
  pr2 ( pr2 ( pr2 ( pr1 ( pr2 X ) ) ) ).

Definition aintdom := ∑ A : acommring,
  ( ringunel2 ( X := A ) ) # 0 ×
  forall a b : A, a # 0 -> b # 0 -> ( a * b ) # 0.

Definition make_aintdom := tpair ( P := fun A : acommring =>
  ( ringunel2 ( X := A ) ) # 0 ×
  forall a b : A, a # 0 -> b # 0 -> ( a * b ) # 0 ).
Definition aintdomconstr := make_aintdom.

Definition pr1aintdom : aintdom -> acommring := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1aintdom : aintdom >-> acommring.


A: aintdom
subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid A)


A: aintdom
subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid A)

  
A: aintdom
subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid A)
 
A: aintdom
issubmonoid (λ x : A, x # 0)

  
A: aintdom
issubsetwithbinop op (λ x : A, x # 0)
A: aintdom
0%addmonoid # 0

  
A: aintdom
issubsetwithbinop op (λ x : A, x # 0)
 
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : A, x # 0
(pr1 a + pr1 b)%addmonoid # 0
 
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : pr1 A, x # 0
pr1 a * pr1 b # 0
 
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : pr1 A, x # 0
pr1 a # 0
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : pr1 A, x # 0
pr1 b # 0

    
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : pr1 A, x # 0
pr1 a # 0
 
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : pr1 A, x # 0
pr1 a # 0
 apply (pr2 a).
    
A: aintdom
a, b: λ x : pr1 A, x # 0
pr1 b # 0
 apply (pr2 b).
  
A: aintdom
0%addmonoid # 0
 apply (pr2 A).
Defined.

Definition isaafield ( A : acommring ) :=
  ( ringunel2 ( X := A ) ) # 0 ×
  forall x : A, x # 0 -> multinvpair A x.

Definition afld := ∑ A : acommring, isaafield A.
Definition make_afld ( A : acommring ) ( is : isaafield A ) : afld := tpair A is .
Definition pr1afld : afld -> acommring := @pr1 _ _ .
Coercion pr1afld : afld >-> acommring.


A: afld

a # 0

Close Scope ring_scope.

(** * VI. Lemmas on logic *)

q: ∏ n : nat,

Defined.

(* Some lemmas on decidable properties of natural numbers. *)

Definition isdecnatprop ( P : nat -> hProp ) :=
  forall m : nat, P m ⨿ neg ( P m ).


P: nat → hProp
is: isdecnatprop P
isdecnatprop (λ n : nat, (¬ P n)%logic)


P: nat → hProp
is: isdecnatprop P
isdecnatprop (λ n : nat, (¬ P n)%logic)

r: ¬ P (S n)
j: ∃ m : nat, m ≤ S n × P m
m: nat
m': m ≤ S n × P m
P m
 apply (pr2 m').
Defined.

P':= λ m : nat, P (S m): nat → hProp
is': ∏ m : nat, P' m ⨿ ¬ P' m
c:= IHn P' is' u: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
v0: P' k
v1: ∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m
m: nat
S m < S k → ¬ P (S m)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ P : nat → hProp,
isdecnatprop P → P n → ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
P: nat → hProp
is: isdecnatprop P
u: P (S n)
r: ¬ P 0
P':= λ m : nat, P (S m): nat → hProp
is': ∏ m : nat, P' m ⨿ ¬ P' m
c:= IHn P' is' u: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
v0: P' k
v1: ∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m
m: nat
i: S m < S k
¬ P (S m)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ P : nat → hProp,
isdecnatprop P → P n → ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
P: nat → hProp
is: isdecnatprop P
u: P (S n)
r: ¬ P 0
P':= λ m : nat, P (S m): nat → hProp
is': ∏ m : nat, P' m ⨿ ¬ P' m
c:= IHn P' is' u: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
v0: P' k
v1: ∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m
m: nat
i: S m < S k
m < k
 apply i.
Defined.
